## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.16

### 🔔 Notifications
- Reworks the camera notification flow so motion and AI notifications can open the matching cached recording in Home Assistant.
- Improves the included camera-event blueprint and adds stale-blueprint detection so older imported blueprint copies can be refreshed safely.

### 🎥 Recordings
- Adds the X-Sense Recordings viewer for camera accounts, with cached playback through Home Assistant and support for X-Sense direct/HLS recording media.
- Improves recording cache behavior, playback routing, mobile viewer navigation, and background sync so notification-opened clips and manually opened clips use the same cached media path.

### 🎥 Cameras
- Keeps SSC0A and SSC0B camera handling aligned with the APK camera category checks.
- Adds supported camera management refinements, including Camera Sleep, charging-state normalization, and APK-matched recording duration/cooldown option handling.

### 🚨 Devices
- Improves alarm-device state handling, including APK-style `XC0M-iR`/Xcom-IR compact field mapping and alarm-topic payload normalization.

### 🧭 HACS Updates
- Keeps the current stable line free of the old `aiortc` requirement and documents the HACS custom repository update path for older installs.
- Restores historical `v1.2.6.x` release history needed by older installs while keeping the current stable release as the normal non-prerelease update target.

### 📚 Documentation
- Updates the README files across the translated language set for camera recording notifications, cached playback, HACS update guidance, and Home Assistant Core 2026.7 compatibility.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage across camera notifications, recordings, camera entities, HACS/release metadata, and device state parsing.
